description: Style NotePerfect for those weekend revelleries, this T-shirt from spykar captures the mood of those fun beach shacks. Team this T-shirt with jeans or shorts and sports shoes for a cool, casual look.Product DetailsWhite and green striped T-shirt,with a V-neck, short sleeves, buttoned placket and printed branding on the left chestMaterial and Care100% cottonWash using mild detergentDo not bleachDo not dry in direct sunlightWarm iron; do not iron directly on print/embroiderySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
